title: Legal Document Tag System Review: LegalTag vs DocLabel Pro 2026 Comparison
description: Compare LegalTag and DocLabel Pro legal document tag systems. Analyze tag creation, tag management, tag search, and tag statistics features. Find the best
content:
Legal Document Tag System Overview

Legal document tag systems add tags to documents for easier search and management. In 2026, LegalTag and DocLabel Pro are two leading professional products. This review compares their tag features.

Tag Creation

Tag FeaturesLegalTagDocLabel Pro
Tag TypesMulti-type tag supportSingle text tags
Tag LevelsSupport tag hierarchy structureFlat tags
Tag ColorsCustom tag colorsFixed tag colors
Tag TemplatesTag template libraryNo tag templates

Tag Management

LegalTag provides comprehensive tag management with tag editing, tag deletion, and tag merging. DocLabel Pro has basic management features. For tag management, LegalTag is recommended.

Tag Search

DocLabel Pro offers powerful tag search with tag search, combined search, and search optimization. LegalTag has basic search features. For tag search, DocLabel Pro is recommended.

Tag Statistics

DocLabel Pro provides comprehensive tag statistics with tag statistics, tag charts, and tag distribution. LegalTag has basic statistics features. For tag statistics, DocLabel Pro is recommended.

Batch Tags

LegalTag offers powerful batch tagging with batch tags, tag templates, and automatic tag application. DocLabel Pro has basic batch features. For batch tagging, LegalTag is recommended.

Price and Selection

LegalTag annual fee: 80,000 CNY; DocLabel Pro annual fee: 60,000 CNY. For tag management and batch tagging, choose LegalTag. For tag search and statistics, choose DocLabel Pro.
author: Tag Management Expert
